# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 58.869 Hz Gain -9.000 dB Q 4.1840
  biquad b0=0.999501665279 b1=-1.99844038921 b2=0.998953557714 a1=-1.99844038921 a2=0.998455222993
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 166.430 Hz Gain +2.999 dB Q 7.9374
  biquad b0=1.00023798322 b1=-1.99872738755 b2=0.998607987815 a1=-1.99872738755 a2=0.998845971032

  biquad b0=0.999485185081 b1=-1.99822658041 b2=0.998744936958 a1=-1.99822658041 a2=0.998230122039

  biquad b0=1.00026061185 b1=-1.99808546887 b2=0.997871184738 a1=-1.99808546887 a2=0.998131796587
